item.title: 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90
item.description: A look at the 1991 De Tomaso Pantera 90, a rare performance car with distinctive styling and a notable place in automotive history. What details stand out most to you?

item.title: 1965 Fiat Abarth Spider: 1 of 30
item.description: A look at a 1965 Fiat Abarth Spider, one of just 30 made. This rare classic stands out for its limited production and distinctive design. What details make it special to you?

media:content.media:description: A look at a 1965 Fiat Abarth Spider, one of just 30 made. This rare classic stands out for its limited production and distinctive design. What details make it special to you?

item.title: 1968 Dodge Coronet R/T 426 Hemi 4-Speed
item.description: A look at the 1968 Dodge Coronet R/T with a 426 Hemi and 4-speed manual. This classic muscle car stands out for its performance-focused setup and period styling. What details make this one memorable?

media:content.media:description: A look at the 1968 Dodge Coronet R/T with a 426 Hemi and 4-speed manual. This classic muscle car stands out for its performance-focused setup and period styling. What details make this one memorable?

item.title: 1969 Dodge Daytona
item.description: A look at a 1969 Dodge Daytona, a standout classic known for its distinctive design and place in automotive history. This showcase highlights the car’s unique details and appeal for enthusiasts.

item.title: 1956 Cadillac Eldorado Seville
item.description: A 1956 Cadillac Eldorado Seville is showcased, highlighting its luxurious styling, distinctive chrome details, and iconic design. The video explores why this Cadillac remains a favorite among classic car enthusiasts. Which detail catches your eye first?

media:content.media:title: 1956 Cadillac Eldorado Seville
media:content.media:description: A 1956 Cadillac Eldorado Seville is showcased, highlighting its luxurious styling, distinctive chrome details, and iconic design. The video explores why this Cadillac remains a favorite among classic car enthusiasts. Which detail catches your eye first?

item.title: 1965 Pontiac Bonneville
item.description: A 1965 Pontiac Bonneville takes center stage, showcasing its elegant styling, spacious design, and classic V8 appeal. The video highlights what makes this full-size Pontiac a standout from the 1960s. What is your favorite feature of this Bonneville?

media:content.media:title: 1965 Pontiac Bonneville
media:content.media:description: A 1965 Pontiac Bonneville takes center stage, showcasing its elegant styling, spacious design, and classic V8 appeal. The video highlights what makes this full-size Pontiac a standout from the 1960s. What is your favorite feature of this Bonneville?

item.title: Red, White & Blue Dodge Vipers
item.description: A collection of Dodge Vipers in patriotic colors celebrates the iconic American performance car. The video showcases their bold styling and powerful presence. Which Viper color would you choose?

item.title: 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic at Klairmont Kollections
item.description: A rare 1934 Hupmobile Aerodynamic is featured, highlighting its innovative styling and place in automotive history. The video explores the design elements that made this classic far ahead of its time. What classic design do you admire most?

item.title: 1966 Pontiac GTO | IT IS A GAS
item.description: A closer look at a 1966 Pontiac GTO, one of the most recognizable American muscle cars of its era. The video explores its design, performance, and enduring appeal among enthusiasts. What is your favorite classic GTO feature?

item.title: 1965 Corvette Convertible Survivor
item.description: A well-preserved 1965 Chevrolet Corvette Convertible is showcased, highlighting its original character, timeless styling, and survivor status. The video takes a closer look at what makes this classic sports car special. Would you preserve it or restore it?
